steps.title: Collect Technician Information
steps.description: Gather all required technician information and contact details

substeps.title: Verify technician personal information
substeps.description: Confirm name, address, phone number, and emergency contacts

substeps.title: Confirm proposed start date
substeps.description: Verify and document the technician's proposed start date

substeps.title: Complete required documentation
substeps.description: Ensure all onboarding paperwork and forms are completed

steps.title: Vehicle Assignment Verification
steps.description: Verify technician has assigned vehicle and complete vehicle setup

substeps.title: Does the tech have an assigned van?
substeps.description: Verify that the technician has been assigned a service vehicle

substeps.title: Verify vehicle condition and readiness
substeps.description: Ensure assigned vehicle is ready for service and properly equipped

substeps.title: Complete vehicle assignment documentation
substeps.description: Document vehicle assignment and provide vehicle information to technician

steps.title: Process Truck Stock
steps.description: Ensure truck is properly stocked with parts and equipment

substeps.title: Verify truck inventory levels
substeps.description: Check that truck is stocked with required parts and tools

substeps.title: Verify all required equipment is present
substeps.description: Ensure technician has all necessary tools and diagnostic equipment

substeps.title: Document stock levels and equipment
substeps.description: Record initial stock levels and equipment inventory

steps.title: Ensure All Systems Are Up to Date
steps.description: Verify all systems and software are current and operational

substeps.title: Verify all software is updated
substeps.description: Ensure diagnostic and service software is up to date

substeps.title: Confirm system access and credentials
substeps.description: Verify technician can access all required systems and applications
